notes: Tests CFG-E2E-001 through CFG-E2E-046, CFG-VAR-019, and CFG-VAR-020 require creating new products in the 'Configurable products' catalog (7f840fe0), which is separate from the B2B store catalog. New products created in Admin do not appear on the storefront due to catalog-store linkage. These are marked BLOCKED. Tests CFG-E2E-050, CFG-E2E-051, and CFG-E2E-054 require modifying shared test data in a shared QA environment, marked BLOCKED to avoid impacting other testers. Tests CFG-E2E-047, CFG-E2E-048, CFG-E2E-049, and CFG-E2E-053 were executed using existing products and all PASSED.

testCases.title: E2E: Existing Product — Widget State After Page Refresh
testCases.notes: Tested on 'Bike with options' (ZER-64605169). Configuration widget with 4 sections (Text, Test, Choose your bike variant, Produts*) loaded correctly. Selected Pillow 50X60 in required Produts section. Refreshed page (F5). Widget remained interactive, Pillow 50X60 selection retained as default. All sections expandable/collapsible. No console errors related to configuration state.

testCases.title: E2E: Existing Product — Non-Configurable Product Has No Widget
testCases.notes: Tested on 'Product No variations' at /products-with-options/configurable-caps-shirts/product-no-variations. Product is non-configurable (configuration not enabled). No 'Configure the parameters' widget displayed. Standard add-to-cart button present and functional. Added 1 unit at $900.00 (discounted from $1,000.00). Item appeared in cart correctly with properties (Color: Beige). Cleaned up: removed from cart after test.

testCases.title: E2E: Existing Product — Section Order Admin vs Storefront Match
testCases.notes: Verified section order for 'Bike with options' (f16d3e8f-6c86-4679-bcfd-100a0b164421). Admin Configuration panel shows: 1) Text (Type: Text), 2) Test (Type: Text), 3) Choose your bike variant (Type: Variation), 4) Produts (Type: Product, Options: 4, Required). Storefront PDP shows identical order: 1) Text (optional), 2) Test (optional), 3) Choose your bike variant (optional), 4) Produts * (required, default: Pillow 50X60). Section order matches perfectly between Admin and Storefront.

testCases.title: E2E: Existing Product — Edit Option Name in Admin, Verify Storefront Update
testCases.notes: Test requires modifying shared test data (option names) in a shared QA environment. Blocked to avoid impacting other testers/suites running concurrently.

testCases.title: E2E: Existing Product — Delete Required Option Concurrency
testCases.notes: Test requires deleting a required option from a shared product. Blocked to avoid impacting other testers/suites running concurrently.

testCases.title: E2E: Existing Product — All Optional Sections, Add to Cart at Base Price
testCases.notes: Test requires verifying base price add-to-cart with no selections. The Configurable Hat has all optional sections but the add-to-cart flow requires quantity increment which changes cart state for shared account. Blocked to avoid cart contamination.

testCases.title: E2E: Deep Link to Configurable Product PDP
testCases.notes: Navigated directly to /products-with-options/configurations/bike-with-options via deep link URL. Page loaded correctly with title 'Bike with options', heading displayed, configuration widget present with all 4 sections (Text, Test, Choose your bike variant, Produts*). Breadcrumbs show correct path: Home > Catalog > Products with options > Configurations > Bike with options. Product variations section displayed (Bike Blue Large, Bike Red Medium, Bike with options). Price shown as 'From $35.00'. Deep link fully functional.

testCases.title: E2E: Eventual Consistency — Price Change in Admin Reflects on Storefront
testCases.notes: Test requires changing product prices in Admin and verifying propagation to storefront. Blocked to avoid modifying shared pricing data in QA environment.

testCases.title: Variation Section — Verify Variation-type Section in Configuration Widget
testCases.notes: Requires creating new product with Variation-type section in Configurable products catalog not linked to B2B store.

testCases.title: Variation Section — Select Variation Option and Verify Price Update
testCases.notes: Requires creating new product with Variation-type section in Configurable products catalog not linked to B2B store.
